queries.q: Synthesize these 8 user interviews into themes and recommendations
We finished a round of customer discovery calls; pull out the patterns across participants
Turn these usability session notes into evidence-backed insights for the team
I have transcripts from 6 churned-customer interviews; what are users actually telling us?
Aggregate the findings from this week's research sprint into something stakeholders can act on
Identify recurring themes and pull supporting quotes from these interview notes
Before our ideation workshop, consolidate what we heard across the 10 discovery interviews
Sales logged feedback calls with 12 prospects; extract the cross-cutting insights with confidence levels
Summarize what we learned from the usability tests, with participant-attributed quotes and limitations
Help me get from a pile of raw research notes to prioritized recommendations grounded in evidence
Write up yesterday's sprint planning meeting for the attendees, decisions and action items included
queries.notes: One internal meeting summarized for its attendees is the partner's job

queries.q: Recap the stakeholder sync from this morning so everyone who was there has the decisions in writing
queries.notes: Single-meeting recap, not cross-participant research aggregation

queries.q: Turn this Zoom transcript of our internal roadmap review into a topic-by-topic summary with owners on each action
queries.notes: Transcript input tempts this skill, but it is one internal meeting for attendees

queries.q: Find the patterns across our last six weekly team meetings
queries.notes: Cross-meeting synthesis over time, not research interviews

queries.q: Analyze these 400 NPS survey responses for themes
The research is synthesized; now frame the problem statement for leadership
Map the customer journey for first-time buyers from discovery to checkout
Refactor this Node script to use async/await

queries.q: What should I cook for a dinner party of six with one vegan guest?
